tool.name: OGS: Mesh2Raster
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'Mesh2Raster'.
tool.command: mkdir inputs; # Verzeichnis für saubere Trennung #for $m in $input_file: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for Mesh2Raster --cellsize '$cellsize' #for $m in $input_file: --input-file "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for --output-file output_1.asc

param.name: cellsize
param.label: cellsize
param.help: edge length of raster cells in result. (min = 0)

tool.help: This tool runs the **Mesh2Raster** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
